A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Prime
programme.desc: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Holly Hunter is an ambitious cop who tries to draw the forensic psychologist out of her self-imposed exile to help catch a murderer who is copying work of other serial killers.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Zak’s little Sister, Tori, shows up unexpectedly at an A-R-C event in the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony and Edyn follow Strag to his home realm of the Underneath. They came to get some of Strag's old relics that could be useful in their search for the Underneath Dreamstone.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The A-R-C is in Paris for a three day racing event, during the opening of the newest attraction - the new LOUVRE TOWER. When Johnny finds himself on a losing streak, he opts to try a new jet upgrade to give him an edge.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler
programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!
programme.sub-title: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Piper becomes fast friends with an alluring stranger named Lark, but as the Storm Hawks soon find out, there is more to their guest than meets the eye.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor needs a brain to complete his latest creation, Frankendino. But the only brain that’s good enough is Edgar’s, so Skor hands Skrap a serrated brain spoon and sends him off to fetch it.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony, Edyn and Strag are ambushed in the Bograth swamp by their old Shadow Magi enemy Chur. After a heated battle, Chur gets his hands on the Book of Elders and incinerates it with a fireball before leaving in satisfaction.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony returns to Earth through the Naroomi vortex relic in order to find the Core Dreamstone, while Edyn, Strag and the Magi Resistance Force battle Agram on the drained seabed of Orothe.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While Johnny and his friend Doug are on a practice run over the Pacific, Doug suddenly disappears in a flash of light. The Metajets discover this isn’t the first time jets have disappeared in the area, and head back to investigate.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The culmination of Dr. Piranoid's attempts at mass gene-slamming comes when he creates a fake vaccine which he claims will protect the citizens of Fission City against just such an attempt.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Tactician
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem’s got a new phone! It’s got apps, lasers, and it even talks. This super smart phone might even out-smart Master Mayhem himself. Meanwhile, Dome Diddy Dome is powered by a teen girl’s phone, dialing up destruction on Planet Earth.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Red Drawn / Pandora's Jock
programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While the team is at a racing event in Canada, Captain Strong is meeting with the World Council aboard their massive jet-liner headquarters.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pod Parents / Zombie Scouts
programme.desc: Suzi, desperate to get McGee sent home, invites her parents for a visit to Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: When Skor discovers a crystal hidden in the Extreme Fighting Championship Belt, he devises a plan to get it. Since only humans are allowed to compete, he tricks Edgar into becoming his protégé.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: On the trail of the Kybar's Teeth Guardian Hyren, the kids find themselves saddled with Evu and Spencer, who choose to come along for the ride.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Dueling for Answers
programme.desc: Playmaker battles Zaizen to unlock Sol Tech’s databank and the secrets to his past!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor decides that if he can’t beat the Kung Fu Dino Posse, he might as well make fools of them – literally. Thanks to an unstable new cloning device, Skor makes clones of all four Dinos – and turns them into clowns.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While on tour at a tropical island paradise, the team finds themselves facing off against a pack of sky-thieves - one of whom has an eye for Maggie.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Confrontation
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: A new group of aerial daredevils, the Stunt-Hawks, have arrived for a series of shows in Soaring Heights, which coincides with a string of daring aerial heists throughout the city.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When Trey’s estranged parents (medical workers on an aerial clinic vessel) crash-land in THE OUTBACK - a remote island prison colony where the worst criminals are living out a life sentence

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.
programme.sub-title: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rebellion
programme.desc: The Decepticons lose another battle: Megatron takes out his frustration on Starscream, beating him half to death for no reason. Sideways uses the situation to try to foment unrest and rebellion.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem has turned over a new leaf! Now, he’s a much nicer overlord. He has even given up his whole “destroy Earth” plan! Yep, nothing suspicious about that. Meanwhile, Teensy the Tri-Terror-Tops just wants to give us all a hug… with his tongue.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A comical dilemma involving Tony accidentally gathering together a herd of unwieldy creatures is solved by Edyn casting a spell. Tony and Strag wonder if they've been relying on Edyn's spells too much to solve their problems, but Edyn isn’t worried.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem takes us behind the scenes to show how all that Mayhem gets made! But he accidentally reveals a bit too much, and once the galaxy has seen MM’s cute little “Dream Board” his only solution is to have RoBro destroy us all.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A battle between Gorgram, Korg & Zed and the Final Dreamers result in Gorgram being sent to the Dream Plane! But just when they all think they're rid of him forever, a clue from the Book of Elders hints that a Dream Plane Hyren exists…

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers' good deeds lead to renewed friendship with the people of Arderial. But when they approach the Guardian Hyren of the realm, it senses the presence of the Core Hyren, and the two powerful creatures resume an ancient argument.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Johnny is recruited into the high-altitude, high-octane world of professional jet racing, as a rookie on the A-R-C circui

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Famous rapper MASTER M.C. KLENZ is shooting his music video at the museum when the Dino Posse learns of a Crystal somewhere in the rapper’s vicinity. As they investigate the video shoot, they notice something strange about Klenz’ back-up singers.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Vash Naroom is in flames. Our heroes are losing their battle against Agram. In his moment of victory, Agram reveals to Tony that he couldn't have escaped the Core without the assistance of one of his closest friends. Right then, Tony wakes up.

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: A double-crossing explorer has found a way inside the ancient Forbidden City, which means Snipe will get his hands on the treasure, unless the Storm Hawks can get there first.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's fast action and big bucks in a slam bang Boardwalk battle for $1.4 million dollars.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Phil Hellmuth vs. Phil Ivey. What more do you need to know?

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Hall of Famer Billy Baxter tries to make the WPT Invitational his own private poker party.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Poker superstar Jennifer Harman is the last target standing at the final table.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Way out west saddle bags full of cash await the winner of the World Poker Challenge.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In the woods of Connecticut, Ted "Hit Man" Forrest looks to knockout his second WPT title.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: WPT champion Van Nguyen leads the way as six of the finest female poker players battle.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The biggest tournament of the year brings the best player in Tour history to the table.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Russia, France, Canada and the USA all send their best poker players to Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Only four players remain in the scramble to survive at Bellagio.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's one wild ride at the WPT Legends of Poker in Los Angeles as this final table fight takes off.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Only three remain at the WPT Legends of Poker in pursuit of a million dollar first place prize.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Reckless pro Mark Seif is back at his third WPT final table and more than willing to risk it all.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Thrill Of The Hunt
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Who Wants To Date A Rock Star
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.
programme.sub-title: Who Wants To Date A Rock Star

programme.title: Laguna Beach: We're Gonna Crash A Party
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Old Friends, New Crushes
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Kiss and Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Headed For Heartbreak
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Hook Ups and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Spies, Lies and Alibis
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: First Date, Last Date
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: It's, Like, Break-Up Season
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Three Day Rule
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Only In Cabo
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Bootcamp
programme.desc: In the 90 minute season premiere 25 girls arrive at bootcamp and meet their host Elle Macpherson. They also come face to face with the other judges, fashion designer Julian MacDonald, stylist Grace Woodward and ex-male model Charley Speed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 1
programme.desc: In the first week of the main competition, the final 14 move into their new model house and participate in a lingerie themed photo shoot. The girls then have their first official elimination of the main competition. One girl is sent home.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 2
programme.desc: The girls receive their makeovers, but not all are happy with their new looks. The models are assigned a photoshoot wearing Links of London couture.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 3
programme.desc: The girls meet Girls Aloud singer Nicola Roberts and take part in a photoshoot for Beat Bullying.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 4
programme.desc: The girls take part in a posing challenge on Carnaby Street then film a commercial for Beyonce's new fragrance 'Heat'. The photoshoot involves being covered in chocolate which proves difficult for one girl who shows up hungover.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 5
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 6
programme.desc: The girls take part in an acting challenge on the Hollyoaks set and one girl gets carried away on a night out with some of the cast members. The girls must do a horror style photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 7
programme.desc: The models face an icy photoshoot when they fly off to Norway.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Back to Seaside
programme.desc: Jenni and Angelina finally bury the hatchet, and the gang takes a nostalgia-filled trip back to Seaside Heights.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Vinny and Angelina: A Love Story
programme.desc: Back where it all started, the roommates enjoy a night back in their original seaside house, but things get messy when Vinny and Angelina air out old dirty laundry.
programme.sub-title: Vinny and Angelina: A Love Story

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: What a Drag
programme.desc: Ronnie makes a surprise appearance at Deena's gender reveal party, and later, everyone heads to Atlantic City for Pauly's DJ gig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Awkward City
programme.desc: In Atlantic City, the roommates do their best to support Ronnie and Jen's relationship while celebrating at Pauly's birthday gig, and Angelina continues to flirt with Vinny.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Heartbreak And Happiness
programme.desc: Aaron breaks away from Daisy but can he win over Dominika? A new Ex arrives and threatens to destroy Bobby and Bayley's relationship. (S9, ep3)

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 7
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is a person with a tongue piercing more likely to get struck by lightning? Can a cannon be built out of a tree? Can the breathalyzer be beaten?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Myths tested: Will using a cell phone near a gas pump cause an explosion? Will silicone breast implants explode or expand in low pressure? Can a standard CD-ROM drive shatter a CD?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 36
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is the brace position recommended in airplane crashes actually designed to kill people? Is driving while talking on the phone as dangerous as driving drunk?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 190
programme.desc: Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake? Can the weight of a bird be enough to tip a teetering car off of a cliff? Can a water heater turned on its side be used as a cannon?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 208
programme.desc: Can man beat machine in a 30-foot, standing-start sprint? Can a driver lose 10lbs during a race? Can the suction created by a speeding car rip loose a manhole cover during a street race?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a jet pack be created from plans on the internet? Do pyramids have special powers?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 135
programme.desc: Will opening all of the windows of a house during a hurricane lessen the structure's damage? Will a human head that has been dipped in liquid nitrogen for 5 seconds shatter when slammed into a table?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 150
programme.desc: Can someone really be knocked out of their socks? Is the force exerted between two cars crashing into each other at 50mph the same as a single car hitting a wall at 50mph?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 38
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to slingshot a person over the border and onto a mattress?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 164
programme.desc: Can honey bees lift a laptop? Can hitting a bug at high speeds on a motorcycle be fatal? Can hanging a bag of water repel flies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 16
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person take to the skies using only a lawn chair and weather balloons? Can someone test positive for heroin by eating a large amount of poppy seeds?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 195
programme.desc: Can you survive a 35-foot fall while covered in bubble wrap? Can a rocket-powered ejector seat flip an upside-down car back onto its wheels, as seen in "Die Another Day"?

programme.title: MythBusters: Buster Special
programme.desc: This special episode pays homage to Buster the Crash Test Dummy. Without him, either dozens of myths would have gone untested or Jamie and Adam would constantly be at the local hospital.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 88
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do birds flying in a trailer cause the trailer to become lighter? Will a boat crashing into a channel marker cleave itself in half?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 203
programme.desc: Can a motorcycle traveling at highway speeds drive across the surface of a lake? Can you survive a jump from a high-rise building with a parachute made from a hotel room's contents?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 3
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a barrel of bricks from the top of a building hit a man multiple times? Can a person be electrocuted by urinating on the third rail?

programme.title: Mythbusters Outtakes Special
programme.desc: It’s a shame that not all of the testing footage can be included in the final show that goes to air. In this special episode, the outtakes are in with never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 27
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be launched by rockets strapped to a chair, like in the Ming Dynasty tale? Can jumping into a ceiling fan cause a person to lose his head?

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Ice Cube, Cedric the Entertainer and the whole crew are back together for a quick trim, some good conversation, a little gossip...and to save their neighborhood!

programme.title: Lost In London
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind film event which was filmed and screened live simultaneously in select cinemas around the world. The film is loosely based on Woody Harrelson's tabloid-worthy crazy London night-out resulting in him getting in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Pushing Tin
programme.desc: Fueled by caffeine and machismo, a rivalry ensues between Nick and Russell, two intensely competitive air traffic controllers, where the winner could lose it all

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A cheerleading-obsessed teenager is sent to a strict summer camp when her parents suspect her of being a lesbian.

programme.title: The Wombles
programme.desc: Tobermory puts on his own TV show.
programme.sub-title: Tobermory On Television / Crossed Lines / Blow the Womble Down / Madame Cholet Returns

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Trains, Pains and Panthers': Rushing to a job interview, The Panther takes the Hover Train, but runs into the Dogfather and his gang. 'Wet and Wild Pinky': To be promoted to Lifeguard, Pink must baby-sit the boss' precocious niece.
programme.sub-title: Trains, Pains, And Panthers/Wet And Wild

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Sometimes even Mask just wants to have fun. That's why Matt Tracker'and Boris Bushkin in Bulldog have joined Brad Turner in Cheetah and Calhoun Burns in Raven at the Round Up Races.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted travel through time to find a truly big dude who will beat up Deacon's bully. Because of a minor malfunction with the phone booth, they end up in New England in 1773. There they serve as the impetus for the American Revolution.
programme.sub-title: More Heinous They Are The Harder They Fall

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Using a special gelatin formula, gels the water in the canals of Venice in order to dig up Cleopatra's golden barge.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Ice Blue Pink': When the daredevil Pink Panther skis into a mountain crevasse, he discovers an ice-encased Neanderthal blue panther. 'Pink Trek': Starship commander Captain Pink and Voodoo Man try to defeat the villainous Bird the Merciless.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinkazuma's Revenge': Don Rosaro Pantero encounters Conquistadors, Aztecs and an uncooperative Parrot in the New World. 'Pinky Down Under': Australian bush guide Pinky is hired by two city slickers who try to poach the rare pygmy plaid kangaroo.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: A map is pieced together from drawings on the backs of paintings in the Louvre which shows where the remote control is to explode the bombs which were placed in Paris during the German occupation.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted's adventures take them to the North Pole with Admiral Byrd, ancient Egypt, and King Tut, and finally to Dr. Livingston in the African jungles as they search for a rare exotic bird.
programme.sub-title: Birds Of A Feather Stick To The Roof Of Your Mouth

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals all the sails and kidnaps the sailmakers from an Icelandic town and then builds an enormous balloon which they fill with geothermal energy stolen from the town's heating plant.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Werewolf in Panther's Clothing': Pinky encounters a werewolf in a spooky European village where the inhabitants are all a little 'batty.' 'Pink Paparazzi': Pinky uses a video camera to try and capture a zillionaire on tape.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: The Australian Outback is the setting for a true Battle of the Giants. The Mask Team is pitted against a Venom Team.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: The Pink is in the Mail
programme.desc: Pink Panther must deliver a package to Big Nose's door, but first he has to get through.
programme.sub-title: The Pink is in the Mail

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: A valuable life-giving meteor is stolen from Professor Stevens by VENOM.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinky's Dilemma': Pinky's pen pal Queen Kong makes a surprise visit to the big city and his life is turned upside down when a cyclone hits. 'Oh Varkula': The Panther spends the night at a castle Varkula defending the ant from Count Varkula.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The Earth is flooded with instant custard. Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to outer space to find the Custard Mite of Glut, a small creature that can eat up the custard, but the planet that houses the Mite is controlled by armoured aliens.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K teams Danger Mouse up with a robot Penfold, and Penfold with a robot Danger Mouse. The robots prove to be a lot of trouble for the real ones, taking instructions too literally or getting stuck running in circles.
programme.sub-title: Four Heads Are Better Than Two

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'A Hard Days Pink': When Pinky's fairy god manager transforms five animals into a piano, Pinky tries to win the big battle of the bands contest. 'You Only Pink Twice': Secret agent Panther must deliver a top-secret valise to the president.
programme.sub-title: A Hard Days Pink/You Only Pink Twice

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM uses laser beams to dry up a waterfall in order to uncover the ancient Scarlet Empress.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Who's Smiling Now': Rookie police officer Panther is assigned to assist the great 'Inspector' in solving the case of the missing Mona Lisa. 'Rob'n Hoodwinked': the Panther joins up with the Dogfather who is posing as the famed Robin Hood.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink-Anderthal Man': Manly Man pursues the Panther through the ages. 'Pink Kong': Despite strong opposition from Voodoo Man, the Panther helps Queen Kong realize her dream of becoming a famous torch singer in New York City.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold puts on Danger Mouse's suit and cannot get out, which confuses Colonel K into thinking he is Danger Mouse. Later, DM and Penfold go to Bratislavakia to find out why all the countries of Central Europe have swapped places.
programme.sub-title: There's a Penfold in my Suit

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to Australia where they pick up top secret plans from an agent rat in the form of a rugby ball. Penfold gets distracted by a boomerang and is later picked up by large bird of prey.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'A Nut at the Opera': When stage hand Pinky accidentally puts the opera's star tenor out of commission and must take over the lead himself. 'Hamm-N-Eggz': Hamm and Eggz royally mess up the wedding of the obnoxious daughter of a Mafioso hit-man.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold swallows Professor Squakencluck's new pill and is turned into a superhero called the Blue Flash. But he causes Danger Mouse more problems than usual as they try to catch a lost messenger pigeon.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: hile cutting trees in the forest, Jacques discovers a petrified (stone) tree.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM plants fast-growing huge vines all over Los Angeles, bringing the city to a halt.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted take a break from their chores by going on a cruise and they wind up on the Santa Maria, Christopher Columbus's ship. Columbus is so offended by these future Americans that he decides not to discover the New World and heads back to Spain.

programme.title: The Wombles
programme.desc: Orinoco becomes convinced he’s become invisible.
programme.sub-title: The Invisible Womble / Orinoco Sees The Light / The Conkering Hero / One Pair of Feet

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: In Hawaii while Matt meets with Rockman and puts a pineapple processing plant into production.Hondo, Scott, and T-Bob watch a celebration at the beach honoring the historical King Kamehameha dressed in a rare cape and helmet which disappears into the sky.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Baron Greenback gets Count Duckula to use his hypnosis powers to turn members of the British Parliament into show-biz crazy entertainers. In exchange, Count Duckula will get a television show.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Hunchbudgie of Notre Dame
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny are involved in a series of art thefts in Paris.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold types up his memoirs. Colonel K tells them that things around the city are suddenly vanishing with a loud "kazonk". Then Danger Mouse and Penfold are kazonked into a void-like dimension by Dr. Crumhorn.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Due to a fluke in the narrator's microphone, Danger Mouse and Penfold are transported to the year 1215, where they have to act out characters from Robin Hood.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold has been littering their home with the crumbs of his aunt's cookies. Danger Mouse and Penfold go to the United States to stop Greenback who has stolen a bunch of landmarks from New York City including the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Jesse James hid gold worth millions in a cave in the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink on the Pitch
programme.desc: Pink Panther and his team of kids go up against Big Nose and his team of robots in a soccer game.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold have a day off, but they use it to go through the Amazon jungle to look for the long-lost crown of Questzebottle, an Aztec king who is known for inventing the practical joke.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: While Penfold is home with a cold, Danger Mouse gets a mission to deal with the Mongol hordes that have recently acquired motorbikes.
programme.sub-title: The Spy Who Stayed In with a Cold

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Cleanliness is Next to Pinkliness
programme.desc: Big Nose and Pink Panther have neighboring showers, but only enough hot water for one of them.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Matt discovers an empty submarine controlled by Brian the Brain, a computer he had given grant money for, and now in the clutches of Mayhem and the VENOM gang.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While visiting Borneo, MASK stumbles upon VENOM's plans to steal the great jade dragon statues from an ancient temple on top of a mountain.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an end of terrace in Harrogate, a property in Teddington, Middlesex where strong vision is needed and in Derby we reveal the effect of inflation on house prices.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a two bed mid terrace in Greater Manchester, a ground floor flat in Balham and a former bakery in South Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a tired house in Derby, a bedragelled bungalow boasting a big garden in Surrey and a mid-terrace in Cheshire where the bathrooms out-number the bedrooms!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a one bedroom property with potential in Hammersmith, west London, a model property in Gillingham, Kent and a 1930's semi in Stockport.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a period house in Cheshire, a house in Kent and revisit a plot of land in Cheshire that we first saw at auction two years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Kent, a property on the Isle of White and a property in Ripon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Chelsea, Northumberland and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a semi detatched house in South Wales, a two bed flat in Surrey and a property in Hastings. We see what happens when these properties go Under The Hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Devon and Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cottage in Orkney, a cottage in Berkshire we first saw in 2007 and a property in London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a terraced house in Burton-on-Trent, a flat in Wimbledon and a detached house in Stockton-on-Tees.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit an old Miners cottage in south Wales, a basement flat in Essex and a rather classy house in Liverpool which is looking for an equally classy owner.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 7
programme.desc: Lucy & Martin visit a gorgeous cottage in Devon, a rather ordinary house in Hemel Hempstead, and in Harrogate, a fantastic family home is on offer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: We visit a run down house in Kent, a terraced house in Chingford, and a bungalow in Hampshire, finding out who buys them and what they pay for them when they go under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 18
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a property in Stoke-on-Trent, a house in Greater London and a property in Wales.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: Trail of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: This tribute to the late Peter Sellers contains unused scenes from the previous Pink Panther films interspersed with new footage and features a great comedic cast.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: Zelig
programme.desc: Leonard Zelig's neurotic insecurity forces him to mimic whomever he's with. Treated by Dr. Eudora Fletcher, Zelig is cured. But when misdeeds from his past resurface, Zelig is on the run, and Eudora must search the world over to find and save him.

programme.title: Last Tango in Paris
programme.desc: Marlon Brando delivers a fascinating performance as a man torn apart by his wife's suicide who attempts to bury his grief in a sudden, purely carnal relationship with an alluring stranger.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote, learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Under the inimitable direction of Robert Altman, Elliot Gould stars as the laid-back, legendary private eye Philip Marlowe investigating a mysterious murder. Also stars Sterling Hayden and Nina Van Pallandt.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organization: the Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect, the Heroes use pizza to tempt him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has a mission to move a mobile anti-aircraft artillery battery, but Klink's new tough second-in-command is impeding the Heroes.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A new prisoner in a corporal's uniform turns out to be a general with a mission for Hogan.
programme.sub-title: How To Cook A German Goose With Radar

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine, Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An African prince comes to Stalag 13 who is negotiating with the Germans for the rights in his country to build a submarine base and Hogan replaces him with Kinchloe.
programme.sub-title: The Prince From The Phone Company

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As Hogan tries to help a German scientist defect, bumbling Colonel Crittendon interferes again.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalter's sister.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.sub-title: A Klink, A Bomb And A Short Fuse

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany, the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent "Tiger" in Paris, Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13, Gen. Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col. Hogan falls for the bait. As a result, Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties.

programme.desc: Hogan nixes a mission to destroy a synthetic fuel plant because the caper is too risky...but he is overruled - and forced to participate in the scheme by the ploy's mastermind, a strong-willed determined female scientist.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers, Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect, Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col. Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguise...who is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp.

programme.desc: Natural sites worldwide hold spiritual significance for civilizations, from ancient rituals to modern reverence, each crackling with unique energy and a hint of magic.

programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1924, a girl found a quartz crystal skull in Central America, believing it had telepathic powers. Legend says thirteen such skulls will unlock life’s mysteries. Modern science has debunked their authenticity, despite some being in museums.
programme.sub-title: The Search for the Crystal Skulls

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Historian Michael Hesemann sought to authenticate the Titulus Crucis, believed to be a piece of Christ's cross. Displayed in a Rome church, it spans from Jerusalem to modern Rome, backed by records since the 1400s.
programme.sub-title: The Quest for the True Cross

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?
programme.sub-title: The Search for King Arthur's Bones

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Had a mysterious German prospector, known as the Dutchman, found the richest gold mine in America? When he died keeping the mine’s location secret, Dick Holmes - a young cowhand - went on a quest to track it down.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1983, Graeme Cunningham vanishes in Salt Lake City. Detective Don Bell discovers Arthur Bishop, who confesses to killing Graeme and four other boys. Bishop is found guilty in 1984 and executed in 1988.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 28, 2005, Joan Porco attends the trial of her son Christopher, accused of murdering his father and attacking her. Despite her initial identification and later refusal to testify, Christopher is found guilty based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Murder by the Mob depicts the battle for justice by Peppino Impastato's family after his 1978 death was misclassified. His mother and brother reopened the case, leading to mafia boss Gaetano Badalamenti's 2002 conviction for the murder.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.
programme.sub-title: Death of a Mail Order Bride

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1991, Ray and Faye Copeland, the oldest death row couple in the USA, are convicted of murdering five drifters. Police find the bodies after a tip-off. Faye's death sentence is commuted to life in 1999.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On October 11, 1998, Dr. Harold Shipman is tried for murdering fifteen elderly patients. Exhumation and evidence of lethal morphine lead to his conviction. He is later found to have killed 215 people.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In July 2000, Sarah Payne is abducted and murdered. Roy Whiting, a convicted sex offender, is found guilty and sentenced to life in 2001. Sarah’s case leads to the implementation of “Sarah’s Law” in the UK in 2011.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Ate the Evidence

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.
programme.sub-title: Death of a Mail Order Bride

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: My Ghost Story

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: Two men retire without knowing their new home sits on the graves of people who were tortured and murdered by the KKK. The Queen Mary once ruled the high seas, but now ghosts roam her decks.

programme.sub-title: It Watches Me While I Sleep

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: An unknown axe murderer still stalks a family he brutally murdered a century ago and then next-door a spirit with a deadly secret haunts a young couple. An off the beaten path bar is stocked with other worldly spirits.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: An entity jumps into a woman's bed and lies down beside her; two sisters' ghosts roam a Civil War-era house; a castle built on an old Indian burial ground is haunted by its original owner; and more.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A man and his girlfriend dream of owning their own "haunted attraction," but end up owning an actual haunted house; and the ghostly voice of a passenger who died in a plane crash is heard in a chilling recording.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A phantom breaches security at a South Carolina government building. A pipe-smoking ghost haunts a lighthouse. A son killed in a car accident makes his presence known to his grieving mother. A demon attacks guests at a Texas house.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A cemetery that's home to 80,000 dead souls becomes a "ghost magnet"; a family discovers that their new home is filled with the sounds of strange footsteps and whispered conversations; and more.

programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team head northwest in this episode, and to a venue that counts reports of a mysterious black shape, and phantom screams as just two of the many incidents reported there. What will the team encounter?

programme.desc: A California man finds his elderly neighbors murdered in their own home. In Ohio, police investigate a bloody attack but cannot find the victim. A pair of psychics join in to help.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: When an Arizona woman disappears, police don't know if it's an abduction or murder. In Louisiana, a roadside attack devastates a family. For both crimes, police find answers through psychics' Rosemarie Kerr and Gale St. John's visions.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: When an Oklahoma man disappears, his family calls in two psychics, hoping for answers. Investigators in Pennsylvania must listen to the dream of a psychic to find a murderer.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: A brutal slaying in Connecticut leaves police with no leads or suspects. A couple in California desperately searches for their missing son. In each case, police turn to psychics for guidance.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: After Ohio police arrest a man for murder, a second suspect claims responsibility. In California, investigators search for a woman last seen with a known killer. Psychics help solve both cases.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: The Seven try to stop the abuse of Chinese laborers working railroad construction.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When J.D. kills a man trying to rob the bank, one of his stray bullets accidentally kills an innocent woman.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A powerful cattle rancher tries to take over the town and abolish the law, until a respected, seasoned judge.

programme.desc: Outlaws attack a band of settlers and kill everyone except a pregnant woman who's rescued by a band of Indians.
